lorebooks.name: Cyberpunk 2077: Night City
lorebooks.author: Jofi
lorebooks.description: A highly detailed sci-fi lorebook for Night City. Featuring the obligatory street slang, the cool presence of mega-corporations, clever cyberpsychosis triggers, network hacking sequences, and interactive braindance sessions.

lorebooks.name: Elden Ring: Lands Between
lorebooks.author: Jofi
lorebooks.description: A grim lorebook of The Lands Between. It introduces the Site of Grace gameplay mechanic, a stamina bar for tactical combat, the dangerous Red Rot poisoning, and a boss summoning chain during long journeys.

lorebooks.name: Modern Anime Academy & Romance
lorebooks.author: Jofi
lorebooks.description: The perfect lorebook for Dating Sim and everyday life. It simulates the learning process, the physiological reactions of embarrassment during flirting, the active triggers of jealousy, and the chain of confession at a festival accompanied by exploding fireworks.

lorebooks.name: Isekai: Fantasy RPG World
lorebooks.author: Jofi
lorebooks.description: A comprehensive lorebook for classic fantasy Isekai adventures.
